_NOTES: This is the TEMPLATE for Android Trusted Web Activity (TWA) Digital Asset Links.
Rename this file to 'assetlinks.json' (drop the .example) when you ship to production.
1. Set 'package_name' to the Play Console package id you registered (typically reverse-DNS, e.g. com.playhoodwinked.twa).
2. Replace the sha256_cert_fingerprints entry with the value from Play Console:
Play Console > Setup > App integrity > App signing > 'App signing key certificate' > SHA-256 fingerprint.
3. Copy the colon-separated hex string EXACTLY as Play Console shows it (uppercase, colons every two chars).
4. If you also use upload signing keys with separate fingerprints, add each one to the array.
